title: Week 3 Day 5 (2/2) — Meeting minutes & exercise
summary: Part 2 of 2 · STT → Llama minutes · streaming · synthetic data assignment.

sections.heading: Commercial-style project
sections.remember: **Meeting minutes**: audio → transcript → **markdown** summary, discussion, takeaways, action items — hybrid **frontier + open source**.
points: Colab lab: `week3/day5.ipynb` · optional Gradio in community notebooks.

sections.heading: Speech-to-text (step 1)
sections.remember: Two paths: **Whisper `pipeline`** (free, slower on Colab) vs **`openai.audio.transcriptions`** (paid, often faster).
points: Colab secret for frontier path: exact name **`OPENAI_API_KEY`**.
Compare transcripts — punctuation may differ; content similar.
You only need one STT path for the exercise.

sections.heading: Minutes with open Llama
sections.remember: Same Day 4 pattern + **`TextStreamer`** for live markdown output.
points: System + user prompts repeat format (summary, discussion, takeaways, actions) — repetition improves alignment.
Watch GPU RAM on second model load in same session.
sections.code:
from transformers import TextStreamer

streamer = TextStreamer(tokenizer)
model.generate(
    **inputs,
    streamer=streamer,
    max_new_tokens=512,
)

sections.heading: Week 3 assignment
sections.remember: Build a **synthetic dataset generator** — describe schema → LLM produces many rows (CSV/JSONL) for tests, fine-tuning, evals.
points: Try multiple open models · with/without quantization.
Optional **Gradio** UI · share examples with course.
Practice until `apply_chat_template` and pad/eos pattern are muscle memory.

sections.heading: Week 3 wrap-up
sections.remember: You can combine **frontier + open source**, use **pipelines** and **models**, and reason about **tokens, layers, inference**.
points: Next week (course): **compare LLMs** and code generation — then **RAG**.
Keep Colab hygiene: GPU reconnect, disconnect paid runtimes, HF_TOKEN each notebook.

cheatSheet: Audio → STT → chat template → generate + streamer
OPENAI_API_KEY in Colab for paid STT
Exercise: synthetic data generator + Gradio optional
